description: Dependency validation rules for Wildlife Watcher Expo PoC

expo.reason: PRD specifies 51.0.0 but 51.0.28 is a compatible patch version

react-native.reason: PRD requirement - must match exactly for override compatibility

react-native-ble-manager.reason: Native module - will be installed in Phase 2

react-native-bluetooth-state-manager.reason: Native module - will be installed in Phase 2

react-native-reanimated.reason: Required by Expo SDK 51 and also supported by React Native 0.74

expo-dev-client.reason: SDK 51 expects ~4.0.29 but 5.2.4 works - intentional deviation

react-native-maps.reason: Matches WW app version exactly for migration validation

@reduxjs/toolkit.reason: Redux state management from WW app architecture

react-redux.reason: Redux bindings from WW app architecture

@react-navigation/native.reason: Navigation foundation from WW app architecture

@react-navigation/bottom-tabs.reason: Tab navigation from WW app architecture

@react-navigation/drawer.reason: Drawer navigation from WW app architecture

@react-navigation/native-stack.reason: Stack navigation from WW app architecture

react-native-paper.reason: Material Design components from WW app

expo-file-system.reason: Expo SDK 51 official file system API
